basics.name: Sahil Pandita
basics.title: Marketplace Growth & Performance Specialist
basics.summary: Marketplace Growth & Portfolio Owner with 5.5+ years of experience driving revenue and category expansion across Amazon and eCommerce ecosystems. Currently owning end-to-end marketplace performance across multi-brand portfolios spanning EU9 and MENA markets at Flywheel Digital (Omnicom), managing €1.5M+ in annual media investments and influencing multi-million GMV outcomes. Proven track record of scaling category demand, balancing growth and profitability through TACoS optimisation, and building repeatable optimisation frameworks to improve execution at scale. Experienced in leading cross-functional teams, influencing client investment decisions, and contributing to new business strategy.

bullets: Owned end-to-end marketplace performance across a multi-brand client portfolio spanning EU9 and MENA markets, managing €1.5M+ in annual media investments across Sponsored Ads, CitrusAd, and Criteo.
Drove 28.34% YoY GMV growth by identifying category-level demand gaps, expanding high-intent keyword coverage, and reallocating budgets toward revenue-accretive segments.
Influenced multi-market revenue outcomes supporting £4.5M+ monthly GMV (UK) and €2.5M+ (Italy) while maintaining stable TACoS and 4–6x ROAS across €25K–€150K/month investment bands.
Generated 38% revenue uplift vs BFCM forecast through strategic portfolio-level budget reallocation and prioritisation during peak season.
Enabled 46% YoY category expansion, including 900% growth in a key sub-category, by aligning search expansion, listing optimisation, and media scaling strategies.
Balanced growth and profitability by stabilising TACoS while scaling investments across high-performing segments.
Built and standardised optimisation frameworks and reporting structures to improve execution consistency and scalability across accounts.
Led a 4-member performance pod, ensuring delivery quality, optimisation consistency, and reporting cadence across multi-brand portfolios.
Acted as client-facing owner across MBRs and QBRs, translating business objectives into marketplace growth strategies and influencing investment decisions.
Leveraged AMC and SQL-based analysis to validate incremental revenue contribution, identify growth levers, and track competitor and category trends.
Contributed to new business strategy by designing marketplace growth frameworks and onboarding approaches for prospective client pitches.

Retail Media & Ads: Managed Sponsored Ads accounts (SA, SB, SD) for advertisers and sellers — conducted ad account audits and delivered optimisation recommendations to improve ROAS and reduce ACOS across managed accounts.
Catalog & Retail Operations: Governed catalog quality standards across a 35-member global cross-functional team including PMs, BIAs, and Program Managers.
Reduced operational turnaround time by 35% through workflow automation and process redesign.
Designed SOP frameworks ensuring listing readiness and marketplace compliance across international markets, directly supporting campaign-readiness for advertiser accounts.
Partnered with Ads and Brand teams to align catalog governance with advertiser campaign performance objectives.
Retail Media & Ads: Supported advertiser and seller ad accounts through Sponsored Ads campaign management (SA, SB, SD), account audits, and performance optimisation recommendations.
Catalog & Retail Operations: Maintained 99.8% catalog accuracy while improving processing efficiency by 27%.
Optimised product listings to strengthen search visibility, keyword coverage, and campaign readiness across IN marketplace.
Supported Prime Day and Great Indian Festival campaigns through cross-team coordination and listing readiness execution.
Contributed to SOP documentation and onboarding of new associates.
Increased closures by 27% through structured lead funnel optimisation and follow-up process redesign.
Reduced customer complaints by 62% via proactive escalation handling and structured CRM workflows.
Create and test short-form content formats across Instagram Reels, YouTube Shorts, and LinkedIn to study algorithm behaviour and organic growth mechanics.
Experiment with hooks, storytelling structures, and trend adaptation to improve reach and engagement across platforms.
Apply data-driven experimentation frameworks — similar to paid media optimisation — to iterate on content performance and refine virality levers.
Conduct ongoing analysis of platform algorithms, content formats, and audience behaviour to build a personal framework for organic growth strategy.

achievements.context: monthly GMV supported across EU9 multi-brand Amazon portfolios (UK and Italy as primary markets).
YoY GMV growth delivered through demand-driven search expansion, keyword prioritisation, and media optimisation.
YoY category expansion driven, including 900% YoY growth in a key sub-category through aggressive keyword coverage and media scaling.
YoY scale achieved in one key sub-category through demand gap analysis and keyword expansion.
revenue uplift vs BFCM forecast through strategic demand-based budget reallocation across EU portfolios.
ROAS maintained while stabilising TACoS and ACOS across €25K–€150K/month investment bands.
reduction in operational turnaround time through workflow automation and process redesign at Amazon Ads.
catalog accuracy maintained while improving processing efficiency by 27% at Amazon Ads.

projects.title: AMC Incrementality & NTB Analysis
projects.description: Built custom AMC SQL queries to measure new-to-brand customer acquisition and validate incremental revenue contribution across EU Amazon portfolios. Used outputs to guide budget allocation decisions in MBRs and QBRs.

projects.title: BFCM Demand-Based Budget Reallocation
projects.description: Designed and executed a real-time budget reallocation strategy during Black Friday / Cyber Monday, shifting spend toward high-converting demand segments. Delivered 38% revenue uplift vs forecast across EU portfolios.

projects.title: Sub-Category Scale — 900% YoY Growth
projects.description: Identified an underpenetrated product sub-category through demand gap analysis and keyword expansion. Scaled from near-zero to 900% YoY growth within 12 months, contributing to 46% total category expansion.

projects.title: EU9 Portfolio Listing Optimisation
projects.description: Executed end-to-end listing optimisation across EU9 markets — keyword research, title and bullet rewrites, backend attribute mapping, and A+ content alignment — directly improving organic search rank and campaign conversion rates.

certifications: Amazon Sponsored Ads Certification – Amazon Ads
AI-Powered Performance Ads Certification – Google Ads
awards: Recipient of the Above & Beyond Award: Apr 2022, Nov 2022, May 2023, Jun 2023
Acknowledged with the Rookie Star Award: Aug 2022
Acknowledged with the Rise n Shine Award: Sep 2025

bullets: Led 5-member team and generated INR 2M+ revenue via BYTECAMP Hackathon execution.
Managed 200+ student community; secured Best Team award at IEEE Bombay Conference.
Executed education and health outreach programs for underserved communities.
